name: Veggie Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 bell peppers, cut into bite size pieces
1 T fresh ginger, grated or minced
1/2 package frozen peas or fresh if possible
1 can tomato sauce (very large if no coconut milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Start cooking the brown rice.
2. Cut all vegetables into uniform sizes first.
3. If simmering for a long time is not feasible, microwave the potatoes until they are almost soft.
4. Turn the heat to medium and cover the bottom of the pan with olive oil. Add minced onions and cook until they become soft. Add 1 tablespoon of curry paste (to taste) and ginger. Stir until well combined.
5. Add tomato sauce or peeled fresh whole tomatoes, then potatoes (unless still being microwaved), and carrots. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add bell peppers and cook for another 5 minutes. Add coconut milk and raisins, then peas. Continue cooking until everything is soft.
Serve over brown rice.
